Command.name: chapter panel
Command.description: Focus the Chapter list (Panel 1)

Command.name: editor panel
Command.description: Focus the Writing editor (Panel 2)

Command.name: A I panel
Command.description: Focus the AI Assistant (Panel 3)

Command.name: save project
Command.description: Save the current project

Command.name: save now
Command.description: Save the current project

Command.name: new project
Command.description: Create a new project

Command.name: open project
Command.description: Open an existing project

Command.name: save as project
Command.description: Save project under a new name

Command.name: import document
Command.description: Import a Word .docx file

Command.name: add chapter
Command.description: Open the Add Chapter dialog

Command.name: new chapter
Command.description: Open the Add Chapter dialog

Command.name: rename chapter
Command.description: Rename the selected chapter

Command.name: delete chapter
Command.description: Delete the selected chapter

Command.name: move chapter up
Command.description: Move selected chapter up in the list

Command.name: move chapter down
Command.description: Move selected chapter down in the list

Command.name: read paragraph
Command.description: Read the paragraph at the cursor aloud

Command.name: chapter title
Command.description: Announce the current chapter name

Command.name: next chapter
Command.description: Go to the next chapter

Command.name: previous chapter
Command.description: Go to the previous chapter

Command.name: read chapter
Command.description: Read the entire current chapter aloud

Command.name: app status
Command.description: Announce current application status

Command.name: stop reading
Command.description: Stop reading / silence text-to-speech

Command.name: run feedback
Command.description: Run comprehensive AI feedback on current chapter

Command.name: comprehensive feedback
Command.description: Run comprehensive AI feedback on current chapter

Command.name: insert at cursor
Command.description: Insert AI response at cursor position in the editor

Command.name: insert at start
Command.description: Insert AI response at start of chapter

Command.name: insert at end
Command.description: Insert AI response at end of chapter

Command.name: save card
Command.description: Save the current AI response as a Response Card

Command.name: read response
Command.description: Read the current AI response aloud

Command.name: export manuscript
Command.description: Export the book as a Word .docx file

Command.name: export PDF
Command.description: Export the book as a PDF

Command.name: open settings
Command.description: Open the Settings dialog

Command.name: voice off
Command.description: Turn off VoiceBook text-to-speech

Command.name: voice on
Command.description: Turn on VoiceBook text-to-speech

Command.name: pacing feedback
Command.description: Run pacing feedback on current chapter

Command.name: dialogue feedback
Command.description: Run dialogue feedback on current chapter

Command.name: style feedback
Command.description: Run style feedback on current chapter

Command.name: structure feedback
Command.description: Run structure feedback on current chapter

Command.name: book feedback
Command.description: Run full-book AI analysis

Command.name: use prompt A one
Command.description: Load prompt A1 — Proofread for grammar and spelling

Command.name: use prompt A two
Command.description: Load prompt A2 — Tighten prose without losing voice

Command.name: use prompt B one
Command.description: Load prompt B1 — Strengthen character voice

Command.name: use prompt F three
Command.description: Load prompt F3 — Add metaphors and similes

Command.name: use prompt J one
Command.description: Load prompt J1 — Write a compelling opening line
